SQLLite.SQL: SELECT NVL(CPR.WELSH_INDICATOR,'N') AS "WelshFlag" FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WARRET ,RETURN_CODES RETCODE ,WARRANTS WAR ,CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR WHERE WAR.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY = ${param.courtId} AND WAR.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY = WAR.EXECUTED_BY AND WAR.WARRANT_TYPE != 'AO' AND WAR.WARRANT_ID = WARRET.WARRANT_ID AND TRUNC(WARRET.WARRANT_RETURN_DATE) = TO_DATE(${param.returnDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND WARRET.RETURN_CODE NOT IN ('AD','AI' ) AND WARRET.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND WARRET.NOTICE_REQUIRED = 'Y' AND RETCODE.RETURN_CODE = WARRET.RETURN_CODE AND RETCODE.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = WARRET.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE AND RETCODE.RETURN_TYPE = 'I' AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER (+) = WAR.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO (+) = WAR.REP_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE (+) = WAR.REP_PARTY_ROLE_CODE

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
